Listed ExchangesIPX StakingRoadmapPress CoverageAboutFAQDocumentsBrandingXangle ProfileContact UsEnglishEnglish한국어Privacy PolicyTachyon Protocol is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy.This Privacy Policy (together with the Terms of Use and any other document referred to it) governs the manner in which the Company collects, uses, maintains and discloses any data collected from you, or provided by you to us. Please read the following carefully to understand our views and practices regarding your data and how we will treat it.

We do not collect logs of your activity, including no logging of browsing history, traffic destination, data content, or DNS queries. We do not process any data related to the online activity of our users.We also take very seriously and put a lot of effort to ensure safe storage and protection of the user's Personal Data (as defined below).
Collection of information

Personal informationIf you seek technical support via email, we will get your email address and the information you provided, but it will be deleted within 48 hours after handling the technical support. Namely, we DO NOT Collect any personal information except you seek technical support from us. Besides, We DO NOT Use, Sell or Disclose any personal information to third parties.

DiagnosticsTo improve the quality of our products and enhance the user experience, we collect diagnostics information and crash reports on our apps, including connection events and error code. As you probably already understood, the data collected for diagnostic purposes does not contain uniquely identifiable information. This information will be deleted within 48 hours after handling the technical issues.

Apps and Apps versionsNumber of daily active users and newly-added users. This information is collected when a user downloads the Tachyon VPN app or connects it. If you experience a connection bug, the Support Team may collect the information related to the Apps version, operating system, device type and time zone for troubleshooting.

Third PartiesTo provide stable service for our users and fix bugs, we use information-gathering modules from third parties that are independent of the functions of the Application and Services. We integrated the Firebase SDK and the AppsFlyer SDK. If not, we cannot guarantee the product quality and user experience.
IPX WalletWe may obtain the wallet address for smooth progress of the events and safety of the wallet. Be assured that the wallet address does not reveal personal information.
Data RetentionAll the data listed above in our privacy policy will be kept for LESS THAN 48 HOURS and then automatically erased from our system permanently.
Data ControlWe store our users` information on servers within the EU. Data processes are automatically done in the cloud.
Disclaimers

We take reasonable steps to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction of your information and data stored on the Website, yet we will not be held responsible for any unauthorized access or use of the data, and we cannot and do not guarantee that information of yours will not be altered before or after its transmission to us. You agree to not hold us and our employees, officers, directors, contractors, consultants, equity holders, suppliers, vendors, service providers, parent companies, subsidiaries, affiliates, agents, representatives, predecessors, successors and assigns liable for any loss or damage of any sort incurred as a result of any misappropriation, interception, modification, deletion, destruction or use of information provided through the Website.

Third Party CookiesWe use the third-party services to help us provide better services on our websites:Google Analytics:The tool uses a series of cookies to collect information and generate a report on website usage statistics, but does not disclose any personally identifiable information.Coinmarketcap:We use Coinmarketcap service to obtain the ranking of Tachyon Protocol on Coinmarketcap.

You may change your browser or devices’ settings to disable or refuse certain cookies on our site. Please note that disabling certain cookies may result in inaccessibility of our services on the websites.

Consent and Age RestrictionWe DO NOT intentionally log any information from children under 18 years old. DO NOT USE the Service if you are not of legal age. Our service is not direct to anyone under the age of 18.

Users in the European UnionWe only collect minimal data to ensure our service. In line with the GDPR, we collect and process the data outlined in this Privacy Policy on the following bases:1. For the purposes of fulfilling our contractual obligations to users, including:To fulfill our contractual obligations to users, eg: Provide users with Apps & Services, and customer support.2. For a legitimate interest associated with the operation of our business.

Changes to the Privacy PolicyWe have the discretion to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Any revisions to this Privacy Policy will be posted on the Website. We may choose to update this Privacy Policy at our discretion, so you should check this page periodically as the terms may change from time to time. Your continued use of the Website constitutes your agreement to be bound by any such revisions to the Privacy Policy. If you disagree with the rules of this Privacy Policy, please do not use the Tachyon Services.
